reviews.author: Thomas J Branch Jr
reviews.text: My experience at the Cove for my wife and I was, hands down, the best and most memorable moment of our lives. The staff did an amazing job with everything, and I couldn't be more happy. We were very pleased with the way they handled our wedding. I highly recommend the Cove to any and everyone.

reviews.text: Just had our Highschool Reunion in this place of 100 pax. The place is nice and especially the owner is so very kind plus she also do some videos and covered the most important part of our reunion. If you planned to have a reunion this is the place I can recommend. Budget friendly and nice accommodation.
